myCampaigns.title: My review campaigns
myCampaigns.subtitle: Active campaigns you've been invited to test.

empty.title: No active review campaigns
empty.description: When someone invites you to test an agent, the campaign will appear here.

pastSessions.title: Your past sessions
pastSessions.empty: You haven't started any sessions yet. Your past sessions and their feedback status will appear here.

endOfPhase.title: End-of-phase survey
endOfPhase.finishedMessage: Participation finished — thanks for the feedback!
endOfPhase.description: When you're done testing, share an overall rating and thoughts about the experience. This is optional — your per-session feedback already counts.

feedbackModal.title: How was this session?
feedbackModal.description: Your feedback helps improve the agent. Rate the session and fill in the questions below before finishing.
feedbackModal.commentPlaceholder: Anything we should know about this session?

endOfPhaseForm.title: End-of-phase survey
endOfPhaseForm.description: Share your overall experience so the team can evaluate this agent.
endOfPhaseForm.commentPlaceholder: What went well? What could be better?

finishDialog.title: Finish participating?
finishDialog.description: You'll be taken to the end-of-phase survey. You can still start new sessions and edit your survey until the campaign closes.
